description: Add a history of an mpoint value. A history is a table of floating point values assigned by sampling a model attribute periodically during a simulation. Review the common c history commands for details regarding the manipulation of histories.

keywords.name: deformation
keywords.description: MPoint deformation, or the determinant of the deformation matrix.

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Magnitude of the accumulated mpoint displacement vector as a result of cycling. Use the component keyword to specify the component to be recorded.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Take a history of an extra variable. Use index to specify the extra index and type to specify the type.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: The location of mpoint. Use the component keyword to specify the component to be recorded.

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the location of mpoint.

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the location of mpoint.

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the location of mpoint.

keywords.name: strain
keywords.description: The mpoint strain. Use the quantity keyword to specify the quantity to be recorded.

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: The mpoint stress. Use the quantity keyword to specify the quantity to be recorded.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Magnitude of the mpoint velocity vector. Use the component keyword to specify the component to be recorded.

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the mpoint velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the mpoint velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the mpoint velocity.

keywords.name: magnitude
keywords.description: This keyword selects which scalar to retrieve from a vector type value, such as velocity or displacement. If the value type is not a vector, this setting is ignored. The available options are: Record the \(x\) -component of the vector. Record the \(y\) -component of the vector. Record the \(z\) -component of the vector. Record the vector magnitude.

keywords.name: kwd:id
keywords.description: Record the history of mpoint with ID i .

keywords.name: kwd:index
keywords.description: For keywords that require it (most notably extra ), this specifies the index that should be used.

keywords.name: kwd:log
keywords.description: If on , the returned number is the base 10 log of the absolute value of the original value. The default is off .

keywords.name: kwd:position
keywords.description: Record the history of mpoint either containing or closest to position v .

keywords.name: zz
keywords.description: This keyword selects which scalar to retrieve from a symmetric tensor type value, such as stress or strain. If the value type is not a tensor, this setting is ignored. The available options are: Record the intermediate principal value of the tensor. Record the maximum (most positive) principal value of the tensor. Note that compressive stresses are negative . Record the mean value, defined as the trace of the tensor divided by {2 in 2D; 3 in 3D}. For stresses this is most often referred to as the pressure. Record the minimum (most negative) principal value of the tensor. Note that compressive stresses are negative . Record the norm of the full tensor. This is defined as the sum of each tensor component squared. Record the octahedral measure of the tensor. Record the maximum shear value. Record the distance of the tensor value to the origin in principal space. Record the volumetric change, or trace of the tensor. Record the Von Mises measure. Record the xx -component of the tensor. Record the xy -component of the tensor. Record the xz -component of the tensor. Record the yy -component of the tensor. Record the yz -component of the tensor. Record the zz -component of the tensor.

keywords.name: vector
keywords.description: In certain cases the type (scalar, vector, or tensor) of the value cannot necessarily be determined ahead of time. Extra variables, for example, can hold values of all three types. This keyword allows one to specify which type it is assumed to be. If the original value type does not match, 0.0 is returned. Specify a scalar float type. Specify a tensor type. Specify a vector type.
